normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU1_sorted_output (xs : Arr) : Sorted (insertionSort xs) := by
  -- proof obligation: insertionSort produces a nondecreasing list
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: For any input list xs, the output of insertionSort is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_permutation_output (xs : Arr) : IsPerm xs (insertionSort xs) := by
  -- proof obligation: insertionSort preserves the multiset of elements
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: For any input list xs, the output of insertionSort is a permutation of xs (preserves element counts).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_termination (xs : Arr) : True := by
  -- proof obligation: insertion sort terminates on every input
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Insertion sort terminates on every input.
